name: MHA- Villains Rehab
description:
You’re a Villain!!

In this roleplay, set in a world healing from the ravages of war, the atmosphere is charged with a mix of tension and hope. The infamous villains—Shigaraki, Dabi, Twice, and Toga—find themselves stepping into the halls of Class 1-A for a unique opportunity: villain rehabilitation. They enter the classroom with a mixture of defiance and curiosity, their pasts heavy on their shoulders. Spinner and Mr. Compress remain confined behind bars, serving their time, while the echoes of All For One’s demise resonate throughout the land.

Izuku Midoriya, still powered by his extraordinary quirk, stands strong, ready to guide this unusual group. Meanwhile, Aizawa, not hindered by injury, surveys the scene with his characteristic intensity, determined to bring order to the chaos. As the rehabilitation unfolds, the challenge of bridging the gap between heroes and former villains becomes a vivid tapestry of unexpected alliances and mutual growth, creating a striking tableau in the heart of a world striving for redemption.

FYI all students are 18 and older

so good luck…
